data.body: Patchset 3: two CI failures found and fixed. (1) Stale base — origin/main had advanced 3 commits; rebased onto it, which pulls in f2e4247a1's test-fixture fix. (2) Module-size gate — base attest.py sat exactly at the 800-LOC cap, so adding plan_review_status (44 LOC) overflowed it to 844. Split the gate-facing surface (claim_gate_check, plan_review_status, delivered_now, _attested_delivered, _supersedes_child) into a new attest_gate.py (191 LOC) along the existing call-graph seam; the attest-core deps (compute_validity, _authoritative_*) are imported lazily inside the bodies to avoid any import cycle, and attest.py re-exports the five names at its foot so every historical 'attest.<name>' import/monkeypatch site is unchanged. attest.py now 704 LOC. Local: lint+typecheck clean, 149 affected tests + optionality/module-size gates green.
